prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 9916→11542→14357→14352→17304，整体呈持续后移趋势，2025 年较 2024 年骤降约 2952 名，为近五年最大单年降幅，基准位次约 17304 名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划 2021 年 30 人、2022–2024 年各 36 人、2025 年增至 44 人；2026 年计划 47 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 3 人（+6.8%），扩招对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为 211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 57 名、2022 年第 47 名、2023 年第 50 名、2024 年第 51 名、2025 年第 55 名、2026 年第 59 名，近年排名略有后移但仍稳居全国前 60，综合实力强劲；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍安检等校园管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 41 位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中，新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、中国语言文学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，经管与人文社科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机、软件、光电、电气等）高度匹配，热门专业热度不减；辽宁省 2026 年高考总报名约 20 万人，按近年比例估算物理类约 14.36 万人，与 2025 年基本持平，竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招 3 人、物理类考生规模基本稳定、工科热门专业持续高热等因素，在 2025 年基准 17304 名基础上，扩招带来的位次后移效应约 708 名，但考虑 2025 年已出现大幅后移、热门工科专业竞争仍较激烈，预计位次后移幅度略小于纯弹性计算值；预测最低位次约 17962 名，区间 17462–18462 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9916→11542→14357→14352→17304, showing a continuous backward trend. In 2025, there was a sharp drop of about 2952 places compared to 2024, the largest single-year decline in the past five years, with a baseline ranking of about 17304. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category was 30 in 2021, 36 each year from 2022 to 2024, and increased to 44 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 47, a slight expansion of 3 places (+6.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 57th in 2021, 47th in 2022, 50th in 2023, 51st in 2024, 55th in 2025, and 59th in 2026. Although its ranking has slightly declined in recent years, it remains firmly among the top 60 nationally, indicating strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), and short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-. Its strengths in economics, management, and humanities and social sciences are outstanding, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026. These align well with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Software, Optoelectronics, Electrical Engineering, etc.), and the popularity of hot majors remains undiminished. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 143,600 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as in 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of 3 places in 2026, the basically stable number of Physics Category examinees, and the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 17304, the ranking backward effect due to expansion is about 708 places. However, given the significant backward shift already seen in 2025 and the still intense competition for hot engineering majors, the actual backward shift is expected to be slightly smaller than the purely elastic calculation. The predicted minimum ranking is about 17962, with a range of 17462–18462.

- Software Engineering (Guangzhou Panyu Campus)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Innovation Class) (Guangzhou Panyu Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Information and Computing Science (Guangzhou Panyu Campus)

- Clinical Medicine (Full English Instruction) (Guangzhou Shipai Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Applied Chemistry (Guangzhou Panyu Campus)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Guangzhou Panyu Campus)
- Spanish (Guangzhou Panyu Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17462–18462, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 hot majors like Computer Science and Software. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 18300), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options and be cautious when applying for Tier 1 majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近四年基本稳定在 3400 名附近、2026 年大幅缩招 16.7%、优势文科专业吸引力较强等因素，缩招带来的位次前移效应约 345 名，但考虑历史类考生规模稳定、学校文科品牌效应较强，预计位次前移幅度略大于纯弹性计算值；预测最低位次约 3075 名，区间 2575–3575 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2534→3542→3387→3414→3450. After 2021, rankings significantly shifted backward, stabilizing between 3387 and 3542 from 2022 to 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 155 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3450. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 25 students in 2021, 22 students each year from 2022 to 2024, 18 students in 2025, and 15 students in 2026, a reduction of 3 students (-16.7%) compared to 2025. The reduction is significant, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 59th, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top in the country, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 41st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with overall attention at an upper-middle level. Its disciplines include Journalism and Communication (A), Business Administration (A), Applied Economics (A-), and Chinese Language and Literature (A-), with outstanding humanities and social sciences strength, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors (e.g., Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Accounting), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese majors have been consistently recommended in recent years. Although Journalism and Communication majors have been significantly discouraged by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks, Jinan University's Journalism and Communication is an A-level discipline, and its brand effect can partially offset negative industry sentiment. Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors turned to recommended in 2024, with rebounding application popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 in History Category based on recent proportions, roughly the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have been relatively stable around 3400 in the past four years, a significant enrollment reduction of 16.7% in 2026, and the strong appeal of advantageous liberal arts majors, the ranking advancement effect due to enrollment reduction is about 345 places. However, given the stable scale of History Category candidates and the strong liberal arts brand effect of the university, the ranking advancement is expected to be slightly larger than the pure elasticity calculation. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3075, with a range of 2575 to 3575.
